name: Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover
author: Poki
description: Step into the world of fashion and glamour with Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover! Become the stylist you've always dreamed of as you dress up your character for every occasion. Choose the perfect outfit, matching shoes, and add a touch of sparkle with stunning makeup. Don't forget to bring your cute pet too! After styling your character, see how many likes you receive or compete in fashion contests. Save your fabulous looks by downloading pictures to share with friends. Get ready to shine and glow up in style! How to play Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover? Click or tap on an item/color to equip it Who created Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover? Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Tag , Tag 2 , Stickman Bike , wall-jumper, Fruit Wheel , and Hockey Stars ! How can I play Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover for free? You can play Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover for free on Poki. Can I play Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover on mobile devices and desktop? Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
